mapper.select: select s.*, r.room_name as rn, r.room_no as ron from reservations s join room_master r on s.room_no = r.room_no where reservation_id = #{reservationId} and status = 'Reserved' and checkout_date >= now();
mapper.update: UPDATE reservations SET status = 'In', check_in_at = NOW(), parking_num = CASE WHEN #{parkingNum} != '' THEN #{parkingNum} ELSE parking_num END WHERE reservation_id = #{reservationId}
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(ppr.room_price, rm.base_price) * DATEDIFF(r.checkout_date, r.checkin_date) FROM reservations r JOIN room_master rm ON r.room_no = rm.room_no LEFT JOIN pricing_policy_room ppr ON rm.room_no = ppr.room_no WHERE r.reservation_id = #{reservationId} LIMIT 1
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(option_charge), 0) FROM options_record WHERE idx = (SELECT idx FROM reservations WHERE reservation_id = #{reservationId})
